ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Full name of the port */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the port is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the port is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "max_depth" REAL /* Maximum depth of the port */,
  "max_draft" REAL /* Maximum draft allowed in the port */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the port */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of vessel (e.g., cargo, tanker) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Carrying capacity of the vessel in tons */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Country of registration for the vessel */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number */,
  "mmsi_number" TEXT /* Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI) number */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the vessel in meters */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vessel */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_owner FOREIGN KEY ("owner") REFERENCES vessel_owners ("owner_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_operator FOREIGN KEY ("operator") REFERENCES vessel_operators ("operator_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel carrying the shipment */,
  "origin_port" TEXT /* Port of origin for the shipment */,
  "destination_port" TEXT /* Port of destination for the shipment */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo being shipped */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of cargo being shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was created */,
  "estimated_arrival_date" TEXT /* Estimated arrival date of the shipment */,
  "actual_arrival_date" TEXT /* Actual arrival date of the shipment */,
  "cargo_value" REAL /* Value of the cargo */,
  "insurance_value" REAL /* Insurance value of the cargo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_origin_port FOREIGN KEY ("origin_port") REFERENCES ports ("port_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_destination_port FOREIGN KEY ("destination_port") REFERENCES ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_handling" (
  "handling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo handling operation */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being handled */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Port code where the handling took place */,
  "handling_date" TEXT /* Date of the cargo handling operation */,
  "handled_by" TEXT /* Person or entity responsible for handling */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the handling operation */,
  "handling_type" TEXT /* Type of handling operation (e.g., loading, unloading) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for handling (e.g., crane, forklift) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_handling_port_code FOREIGN KEY ("port_code") REFERENCES ports ("port_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cargo_handling_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customs document */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of customs document (e.g., Bill of Lading) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the document */,
  "customs_office" TEXT /* Customs office where the document was issued */,
  "declaration_number" TEXT /* Declaration number for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customs_documents_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, operator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., shipment_update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port where the vessel is docked */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the vessel at the port */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the vessel from the port */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vessel (e.g., docked, departed) */,
  "berth_number" TEXT /* Berth number assigned to the vessel */,
  "pilot_assigned" TEXT /* Pilot assigned to the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_movements_pilot_assigned FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_assigned") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_movements_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_movements_port_code FOREIGN KEY ("port_code") REFERENCES ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargo_types" (
  "cargo_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo type */,
  "cargo_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cargo type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo type */,
  "hazardous" INTEGER /* Whether the cargo is hazardous */,
  "perishable" INTEGER /* Whether the cargo is perishable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "port_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code of the port providing the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_port_services_port_code FOREIGN KEY ("port_code") REFERENCES ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result status of the compliance check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the check */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation being checked against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel operator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pilot */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)
